title: • Scale
content:
• Scale
• Rotation
• Possibly Anchor Point for pivot-shifted drift
• These motions should feel like micro-gravity drift, non-linear, ambient, and layered.

⸻

🔧 3. TECHNICAL MOTION EXECUTION

From your screenshots and notes:
• You’re using keyframes on Position and Scale, potentially with:
• Linear drifts (subtle panning or zooming)
• Layer desync (timing offset across V1/V2/V3…)
• Speed remains at 100%—motion isn’t time-warped, just layered.

⸻

🎭 4. MOTION IS DIFFERENT FROM TRANSITIONS
• You showed both motion and crossfades.
• Motion is continuous and internal to the clip/layer, whereas transitions (e.g., fade, dip, dissolve) are interstitial.
